zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II於大約1166年出生在英國。她與Jordan De Héron結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II于大约1166年出生在英国。她与Jordan De Héron结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

variants.name: Jordin

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II was born about 1166, in England. She married Jordan De Héron. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II est née environ 1166, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Jordan De Héron. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II wurde um 1166 in England geboren. Sie hat Jordan De Héron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II è nata il circa 1166 nel England. Lei sposato Jordan De Héron. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron IIは約1166年にイギリスで生まれた。Jordan De Héronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II(은)는 대략 1166년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Jordan De Héron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II nasceu aproximadamente 1166, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Jordan De Héron. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II родилась около 1166 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jordan De Héron. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan De Heron II nació aproximadamente 1166, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Jordan De Héron. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
